mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.content, b.likes, b.views, b.created_at AS createdAt, u.name AS writerName FROM board b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.content, b.likes, b.views, b.created_at, u.name AS writerName, u.id AS writerId FROM board b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM board_like WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND user_id = #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET likes = likes - 1 WHERE id = #{boardId} AND likes > 0
